016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.services;
017
018import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcShutdownService;
019import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.AbstractJsonRpcService;
020import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.JsonRpcServiceWrapper;
021import org.slf4j.Logger;
022import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
023
024import java.io.Closeable;
025import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandles;
026import java.lang.reflect.Method;
027import java.util.Map;
028import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
029
030/**
031 * Simple Echo JSON-RPC Service
032 */
033public class EchoJsonRpcService extends AbstractJsonRpcService implements Closeable {
034    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(EchoJsonRpcService.class);
035    private static final Map<String, Method> methods = JsonRpcServiceWrapper.reflect(MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass());
036    private static final String helpString =
037            "echo message\n" +
038            "help\n" +
039            "stop\n";
040
041    private final JsonRpcShutdownService shutdownService;
042
043    public EchoJsonRpcService(JsonRpcShutdownService shutdownService) {
044        super(methods);
045        this.shutdownService = shutdownService;
046    }
047
048    @Override
049    public void close() {
050        log.info("Closing");
051    }
052
053    public CompletableFuture<String> echo(String message) {
054        log.debug("EchoJsonRpcService: echo {}", message);
055        return result(message);
056    }
057
058    public CompletableFuture<String> help() {
059        log.debug("EchoJsonRpcService: help");
060        return result(helpString);
061    }
062
063    /**
064     * Initiate server shutdown. This is a JSON-RPC method and will initiate but not
065     * complete server-shutdown because it must return a response to the client.
066     * @return A status string indicating the server is stopping
067     */
068    public CompletableFuture<String> stop() {
069        log.info("stop");
070        String message = shutdownService.stopServer();
071        return result(message);
072    }
073}
